data.title: Energy Services Set to Benefit Once Iran War Ends, Barclays Says
data.description: The European energy services sector faces a brighter future once the Middle East conflict de-escalates as a result of work that oil producers need to undertake to resolve disruption, according to Barclays Plc analysts.
data.keywords: Europe,BARCLAYS PLC,Iran,War,Middle East,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,VIRIDIEN,Gas Prices,Energy Security,Construction,markets
